window_summary: This window tracks the recent liriliri/eruda release stream from v2.6.1 through v3.4.3, covering bug fixes, new features like drag-to-resize, inline mode, shadow DOM support, and plugin additions such as Vue devtools.

chunks.title: v2.6.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: liriliri/eruda
Release: v2.6.1
Tag: v2.6.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-11-26T09:57:19Z; created_at: 2022-11-26T09:38:00Z
Release notes:
* fix: dark mode scrollbar style
* fix: unable to load timing plugin
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the liriliri/eruda release v2.6.1, the release notes include fixes for dark mode scrollbar style and an issue preventing the timing plugin from loading.

* feat(sources): remove code beautify
* fix: code plugin theme
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the liriliri/eruda release v2.6.2, the release notes add support for Android 5.0, remove code beautify from the sources plugin, and fix the code plugin theme.

chunks.title: v2.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: liriliri/eruda
Release: v2.8.0
Tag: v2.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-11T15:37:34Z; created_at: 2022-12-11T15:36:22Z
Release notes:
* feat(info): copy
* feat(sources): use luna syntax highlighter
* feat(network): use luna data grid
* feat(network): copy as curl #220
* fix(network): recognize JSON #201
* fix: init with shadow dom style error #195
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the liriliri/eruda release v2.8.0, the release notes add copy functionality to the info plugin, use luna syntax highlighter in sources, use luna data grid in network, add copy as curl in network (#220), recognize JSON in network (#201), and fix a shadow DOM style error during initialization (#195).

chunks.title: v2.11.0
chunks.raw_text:

Tag: v2.11.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-19T11:15:38Z; created_at: 2023-01-19T11:14:54Z
Release notes:
* feat(network): filter
* feat(info): add backers
* feat(settings): use luna setting
* feat(resources): use luna data grid
* feat(resources): copy storage, cookie
* fix(sources): code not selectable
* fix(console): filter api
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the liriliri/eruda release v2.11.0, the release notes add a filter to the network plugin, add backers to the info plugin, use luna setting in settings, use luna data grid in resources, add copy storage and cookie in resources, fix unselectable code in sources, and fix the console filter API.

questions.query_text: In the liriliri/eruda releases, which release introduces drag-to-resize functionality and replaces the browser prompt with a luna modal?

answer_support.answer_text: introduce drag-to-resize functionality, updated icons, and replacement of the browser prompt with a luna modal

questions.query_text: Across the liriliri/eruda releases, how does the network plugin change described in v2.8.0 differ from the network plugin change described in v2.11.0?

options.text: v2.8.0 adds copy as curl and JSON recognition, while v2.11.0 adds a filter.
v2.8.0 removes the network plugin, while v2.11.0 reintroduces it with a filter.
Both releases only update the network plugin's data grid styling.
v2.8.0 adds a filter, while v2.11.0 adds copy as curl.

questions.expected_answer: v2.8.0 adds copy as curl and JSON recognition, while v2.11.0 adds a filter.

answer_support.answer_text: add copy as curl in network (#220), recognize JSON in network (#201)
add a filter to the network plugin

questions.query_text: In the liriliri/eruda release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds an AMOLED theme and system preference theme support, (2) a release that adds a Vue devtools plugin, (3) a release that supports shadow DOM and fixes quirks mode table rendering, (4) a release that fixes a WebSocket message base64 encoding issue.

answer_support.answer_text: add an AMOLED theme (#414), support system preference theme configuration
fix a WebSocket message base64 encoding issue (#447)
support shadow DOM (#158) and fix quirks mode table rendering (#459)
